name: reading-pipeline
description: Summarize research papers, convert documents to EPUB or KEPUB, and send them to a Kobo or reMarkable via Google Drive.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize, convert, and send reading material
interface.longDescription: Summarize academic papers, convert documents and conversation content to EPUB or KEPUB, and upload files to Google Drive folders that sync with Kobo and reMarkable devices.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this research paper for a general audience.
Send this file to my e-reader.
